---
id: checks-which-user-i-ds-exist-in-dawarich
title: "Checks which user IDs exist in Dawarich"
description: "Internal endpoint used by the Subscription Manager. Authenticated via the `X-Webhook-Secret` header (NOT an api_key). Given a list of user IDs, returns which ones exist and which are missing."
sidebar_label: "Checks which user IDs exist in Dawarich"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/dawarich-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";

import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Checks which user IDs exist in Dawarich"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/users/exist"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Internal endpoint used by the Subscription Manager. Authenticated via the `X-Webhook-Secret` header (NOT an api_key). Given a list of user IDs, returns which ones exist and which are missing.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
